name: man-illustration
desc: Digital painting portrait of a 30-year-old Chinese man with short neat black hair parted to the side, slim angular face, wearing a solid black turtleneck sweater. 3D rendered illustration style, soft studio lighting, clean background. NOT a photograph. Anime-inspired semi-realistic digital art.

name: woman-illustration
desc: Digital painting portrait of a 28-year-old Chinese woman with long wavy brown hair past her shoulders, soft oval face, wearing a beige trench coat over a white collared blouse. 3D rendered illustration style, soft studio lighting, clean background. NOT a photograph. Anime-inspired semi-realistic digital art.

name: cafe-illustration
desc: Digital painting of a cozy coffee shop interior. Small round wooden table with two white ceramic latte cups. Warm afternoon sunlight through a window with sheer curtains. Wooden furniture, warm tones. Illustrated environment concept art style.
